name: Paella Valenciana
description: Traditional Valencian rice dish with chicken, rabbit, green beans, and saffron cooked in a wide shallow pan.

name: Tortilla Espanola
description: Classic Spanish omelette made with eggs, potatoes, and onion, slowly cooked until golden on both sides.

name: Gazpacho Andaluz
description: Chilled Andalusian tomato soup blended with peppers, cucumber, garlic, and bread, served cold in summer.

name: Spaghetti Carbonara
description: Roman pasta dish with guanciale, egg yolks, Pecorino Romano, and black pepper. No cream allowed.

name: Tacos al Pastor
description: Mexican street tacos with marinated pork cooked on a vertical spit, served with pineapple, onion, and cilantro.

name: Salmon Nigiri Sushi
description: Japanese hand-pressed sushi with fresh salmon slices over seasoned vinegared rice.

name: Pad Thai
description: Thai stir-fried rice noodles with shrimp, tofu, bean sprouts, peanuts, and tamarind sauce.

name: Tonkotsu Ramen
description: Rich and creamy Japanese pork bone broth ramen with chashu pork, soft-boiled egg, and nori.

name: Ceviche Peruano
description: Peruvian raw fish cured in fresh lime juice with red onion, chili, and cilantro, served with sweet potato.

name: Butter Chicken
description: Creamy Indian curry with tender chicken pieces in a rich tomato, butter, and spice sauce.

name: Coq au Vin
description: French braised chicken in red wine with mushrooms, pearl onions, and lardons.

name: Bibimbap
description: Korean mixed rice bowl topped with sauteed vegetables, beef, fried egg, and gochujang sauce.

name: Moussaka
description: Greek layered casserole with eggplant, spiced lamb mince, and creamy bechamel sauce baked until golden.

name: Pho Bo
description: Vietnamese beef noodle soup with aromatic star anise broth, rice noodles, and fresh herbs.

name: Risotto ai Funghi Porcini
description: Creamy Italian risotto with dried porcini mushrooms, white wine, and Parmigiano-Reggiano.

name: Falafel
description: Middle Eastern deep-fried chickpea patties seasoned with herbs, served in pita with tahini sauce.

name: Fish and Chips
description: British classic of beer-battered cod fried until crispy, served with thick-cut chips and mushy peas.

name: Hungarian Goulash
description: Hearty Hungarian stew with beef, onions, and paprika, slow-cooked until tender and deeply flavored.

name: Har Gow (Shrimp Dumplings)
description: Cantonese translucent steamed dumplings filled with whole shrimp and bamboo shoots.

name: Pierogi
description: Polish dumplings filled with potato and cheese, boiled then pan-fried in butter with caramelized onions.

name: Jollof Rice
description: West African one-pot tomato rice with scotch bonnet peppers, spices, and smoky flavors.

name: Shakshuka
description: North African eggs poached in a spiced tomato and pepper sauce, served with crusty bread.

name: Beef Bourguignon
description: French slow-braised beef stew in Burgundy wine with carrots, mushrooms, and pearl onions.

name: Tom Yum Goong
description: Thai hot and sour shrimp soup with lemongrass, galangal, kaffir lime leaves, and mushrooms.

name: Empanadas Argentinas
description: Argentine baked pastry turnovers filled with seasoned beef, olives, egg, and cumin.

name: Massaman Curry
description: Rich Thai Muslim-influenced curry with tender beef, potatoes, peanuts, and warm spices in coconut milk.

name: Arepas Reina Pepiada
description: Venezuelan corn cakes stuffed with shredded chicken and avocado salad.

name: Ossobuco alla Milanese
description: Milanese braised veal shanks in white wine and broth, finished with gremolata of lemon, garlic, and parsley.

name: Peking Duck
description: Chinese roasted duck with lacquered crispy skin, served with thin pancakes, scallions, and hoisin sauce.

name: Cacio e Pepe
description: Roman pasta with just three ingredients: tonnarelli pasta, Pecorino Romano, and freshly cracked black pepper.

name: Thai Green Curry
description: Aromatic Thai curry with chicken, Thai eggplant, and bamboo shoots in green curry paste and coconut milk.

name: Churrasco Brasileiro
description: Brazilian-style grilled picanha steak seasoned with coarse salt, sliced thin and served with farofa.

name: Bouillabaisse
description: Provencal fisherman's stew with mixed seafood, saffron, fennel, and tomatoes, served with rouille and croutons.

name: Kimchi Jjigae
description: Korean fermented kimchi stew with pork belly, tofu, and vegetables, bubbling hot and deeply savory.

name: Cochinita Pibil
description: Yucatecan slow-roasted pork marinated in achiote and sour orange, wrapped in banana leaves.

name: Ratatouille
description: Provencal vegetable dish with layered slices of eggplant, zucchini, tomato, and bell pepper baked in herb sauce.

name: Masala Dosa

name: Lamb Tagine with Apricots
description: Moroccan slow-cooked lamb stew with dried apricots, almonds, and warm spices in a conical clay pot.

name: Ahi Tuna Poke Bowl
description: Hawaiian raw ahi tuna cubes marinated in soy and sesame, served over rice with avocado and edamame.

name: Wiener Schnitzel
description: Austrian breaded and fried veal cutlet pounded thin, served with lemon wedge and potato salad.

name: Mole Poblano

name: Borscht
description: Eastern European beet soup with cabbage, potatoes, and dill, served hot with a dollop of sour cream.

name: Laksa
description: Malaysian spicy coconut noodle soup with shrimp, tofu puffs, and bean sprouts in a rich curry broth.

name: Pupusas

name: Khao Soi
description: Northern Thai coconut curry noodle soup with chicken, crispy egg noodles, and pickled mustard greens.

name: Patatas Bravas
description: Spanish fried potato cubes served with spicy bravas tomato sauce and garlic aioli.

name: Gyoza
description: Japanese pan-fried dumplings with pork and cabbage filling, crispy on the bottom and steamed on top.

name: Bangers and Mash
description: British comfort food with pork sausages on creamy mashed potatoes, topped with onion gravy.

name: Tabbouleh
description: Lebanese parsley and bulgur wheat salad with tomatoes, mint, lemon juice, and olive oil.

name: Nasi Goreng
description: Indonesian fried rice with sweet soy sauce, shrimp paste, chicken, and a fried egg on top.

name: Jambalaya
description: Louisiana Creole rice dish with andouille sausage, shrimp, chicken, and the holy trinity of vegetables.

name: Banh Mi
description: Vietnamese baguette sandwich with grilled pork, pickled daikon and carrots, cilantro, and jalapenos.

name: New England Clam Chowder
description: Thick and creamy American soup with clams, potatoes, celery, and bacon in a milk-based broth.

name: Dal Makhani
description: North Indian creamy black lentil dal slow-cooked overnight with butter, cream, and warm spices.

name: Pulpo a la Gallega
description: Galician-style octopus boiled tender, sliced, and served on potatoes with olive oil, paprika, and sea salt.

name: Beef Rendang
description: Indonesian dry curry of beef slow-cooked in coconut milk and spice paste until dark, rich, and tender.

name: Crepes Suzette
description: French thin crepes flambeed in a caramelized orange butter sauce with Grand Marnier liqueur.

name: Kottu Roti
description: Sri Lankan chopped flatbread stir-fried with vegetables, egg, and spices on a hot griddle.

name: Arroz con Pollo
description: Latin American one-pot chicken and rice with sofrito, beer, and peas, colored with sazon and annatto.

name: Tiramisu
description: Italian layered dessert with espresso-soaked ladyfingers, mascarpone cream, and cocoa powder.

name: Samosa
description: Indian fried pastry triangles filled with spiced potatoes, peas, and cumin, served with mint chutney.

name: BBQ Pulled Pork
description: American slow-smoked pork shoulder shredded and tossed in tangy barbecue sauce, served on brioche buns.

name: Vatapa
description: Bahian Brazilian creamy shrimp stew with coconut milk, palm oil, peanuts, and bread thickener.

name: Poutine
description: Canadian dish of crispy french fries topped with cheese curds and smothered in hot brown gravy.

name: Croquetas de Jamon
description: Spanish creamy bechamel fritters filled with serrano ham, breaded and deep-fried until golden and crispy.

name: Jamaican Jerk Chicken
description: Jamaican chicken marinated in fiery scotch bonnet and allspice jerk paste, grilled over pimento wood.

name: Keema Matar
description: Indian spiced minced lamb curry with green peas, cooked with ginger, garlic, and garam masala.

name: Okonomiyaki
description: Japanese savory pancake with shredded cabbage, pork belly, topped with okonomiyaki sauce and bonito flakes.

name: Fesenjan
description: Persian pomegranate and walnut stew with chicken, sweet and tangy with a velvety sauce.

name: Gnocchi alla Sorrentina
description: Italian potato gnocchi baked in tomato sauce with mozzarella and fresh basil until bubbly.

name: Som Tam (Green Papaya Salad)
description: Thai spicy green papaya salad pounded in a mortar with tomatoes, green beans, peanuts, and dried shrimp.

name: Bunny Chow
description: South African Durban curry served inside a hollowed-out loaf of white bread.

name: Carne Asada
description: Mexican grilled marinated flank steak served with charred scallions, guacamole, and warm tortillas.

name: Bobotie
description: South African spiced minced meat bake with egg custard topping, raisins, and almonds.

name: Stamppot
description: Dutch comfort dish of mashed potatoes with kale, served with smoked sausage and gravy.

name: Filipino Adobo
description: Filipino braised pork and chicken in soy sauce, vinegar, garlic, and bay leaves until tender and savory.

name: Causa Limena
description: Peruvian layered cold potato terrine with aji amarillo, filled with chicken or tuna salad and avocado.

name: Char Siu (BBQ Pork)
description: Cantonese barbecued pork glazed with honey, five-spice, and hoisin, roasted until caramelized and sticky.

name: Gambas al Ajillo
description: Spanish garlic shrimp sizzled in olive oil with sliced garlic, dried chili, and a splash of sherry.

name: Pappardelle al Ragu di Cinghiale
description: Tuscan wide ribbon pasta with slow-cooked wild boar ragu in red wine and tomatoes.

name: Dolma (Stuffed Grape Leaves)
description: Turkish stuffed grape leaves with spiced rice, pine nuts, currants, and fresh herbs, served cold with yogurt.

name: Katsu Curry
description: Japanese breaded and fried pork cutlet served over rice with a thick, mild curry sauce.

name: Cachapa
description: Venezuelan sweet corn pancake folded over queso de mano and butter, savory-sweet and golden.

name: Tandoori Chicken
description: Indian chicken marinated in yogurt, turmeric, and tandoori spices, roasted at high heat until charred.

name: Souffle au Fromage
description: French cheese souffle made with Gruyere, puffed golden and airy, served immediately from the oven.

name: Mapo Tofu
description: Sichuan spicy tofu with ground pork in a numbing chili bean paste sauce with Sichuan peppercorns.

name: Aloo Gobi
description: Indian dry curry with potatoes and cauliflower stir-fried with turmeric, cumin, and coriander.

name: Bacalhau a Bras
description: Portuguese shredded salt cod with matchstick fries and scrambled eggs, garnished with olives and parsley.

name: Kung Pao Chicken
description: Sichuan stir-fried chicken with peanuts, dried chilies, and Sichuan peppercorns in a sweet-savory sauce.

name: Fabada Asturiana
description: Asturian white bean stew with chorizo, morcilla, and pork shoulder, rich and deeply smoky.

name: Larb (Thai Meat Salad)
description: Thai minced pork salad with roasted rice powder, fish sauce, lime, chili, and fresh mint.

name: Locro Argentino
description: Argentine thick corn and white bean stew with pork, chorizo, and butternut squash for national holidays.

name: Baba Ganoush
description: Smoky Middle Eastern roasted eggplant dip blended with tahini, lemon, and garlic, served with pita.

name: Cottage Pie
description: British minced beef in rich gravy topped with creamy mashed potatoes and baked until golden.

name: Chole Bhature
description: North Indian spiced chickpea curry served with deep-fried puffy bread, a popular street food.

name: Cassoulet
description: French slow-baked casserole from Toulouse with white beans, duck confit, sausages, and pork.

name: Chirashi Bowl
description: Japanese scattered sushi bowl with assorted sashimi, tamago, shrimp, and vegetables over seasoned rice.

name: Ackee and Saltfish
description: Jamaican national dish of sauteed ackee fruit with salted cod, onions, tomatoes, and scotch bonnet.

name: Turkish Pide
description: Turkish boat-shaped flatbread filled with spiced ground lamb, egg, and cheese, baked in a wood oven.

name: Lomo Saltado
description: Peruvian stir-fried beef with tomatoes, onions, and aji amarillo, served with french fries and rice.
